title: AW, MI SANG TAMPI’N ZAI SA DING

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Aw mi sang tam pi’n zai sa ding,
Hong tang vang lian phat ni hong taang vanglian phat
Ka Pasian vang lian belna le hong hehpihna phat ni
Hong hehpihna phat ni, hong heh pih na phat

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Aw ka lim belh kei mah hong kha’n
hong piang tang bang dam na hong pian
Hih lei tung mi khempeuh tungah na thupha dimta hen
thupha dim ta hen Na thuphadam ta hen

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Aw Jesuh aw nang mah siangbel
Mawh nei te’n zong hong theih zawh
Ka muan lianbel na hi, Ka muan lianbel na hi,

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Mawhna khempeuh hong phet zo hi,
Mi vai tham zong gum khia
A si phabel hong luang sak hi,
Eite hong itna hi eite hong itna hi

sections.label: Verse 5
lines: Beng ngongte aw khua za un la
Pau thei lo te’n phat un, Pau thei lo
